name: Vespertine
creator: Jeanne Castel
description: A powdered twilight of iris and violet wrapped in a cool breath of ambergris. An imagined house scent from between the wars.

name: Cendres de Novembre
creator: Theodor Vrabec
description: Smouldering birch tar over a resinous labdanum heart. Reads like the inside of an empty fireplace on a damp autumn morning.

name: Hortus Solstice
description: A brisk, leafy chypre built around tomato leaf and crushed galbanum. Garden walls and summer rain.

name: Pelerine Blanche
creator: Aurélie Hainaut
description: A chilly aldehydic rose, laundered and lightly powdered. An heirloom in the Maison Vésper archive.

name: Courier 47
creator: Mikhail Varenne
description: A dispatch-rider's leather jacket traced with pipe tobacco and bitter moss. Built for postwar austerity.

name: Zephyr en Saison
description: A translucent aquatic, more breeze than water. Cucumber and white tea drying on the balcony.

name: Nocturne de Corbeau
creator: Theodor Vrabec
description: A plum-dark oriental that leans on boozy rum and aged patchouli. Unapologetically eighties in spirit.

name: Signalman
creator: Edmund Halse
description: A textbook fougère dressed in workwear: lavender, hay, and the faint smoke of a station platform.

name: Limonaia
description: A bright and unsentimental citrus cologne, closer to a terracotta pot of lemon trees than to perfume.

name: Tramontane
creator: Jeanne Castel
description: A dry mountain wind over evergreens. Juniper and rosemary sharpened against a cold resinous base.

name: Boulangerie 04h
creator: Nour el Ghazal
description: A gourmand set inside a pre-dawn bakery. Warm brioche crust, browned butter, a drift of almond sugar.

name: Rivière Basse
description: Mineral and green, with the cool wet-stone character of a shaded riverbed under overhanging cedars.

name: Santal Obscur
creator: Mikhail Varenne
description: A brooding sandalwood polished with saffron and rose absolute. Heavy with leather in the dry down.

name: Eglantine No. 3
creator: Claire Rousselot
description: A hedgerow rose, faintly tart with raspberry leaf and a pinch of clove. Modest and unfussy.

name: Fondant Salé
description: Salted caramel translated straight to skin: brown butter, tonka, and a whisper of hazelnut praline.

name: Oakline
creator: Edmund Halse
description: A classical chypre in the old line: bergamot over mossy labdanum, cut with a slice of tobacco-leather.

name: Ciel Aplati
creator: Nour el Ghazal
description: A cool, almost metallic take on iris, stretched under a flat ozonic sky.

name: Cuir d'Atelier
description: A workshop leather softened with iris butter. Dusty, quiet, and upholstered.

name: Grand Thé Brumeux
creator: Lia Borromeo
description: Smoky lapsang under jasmine steam. A muted, meditative tea note that hangs around for hours.

name: Villa Écarlate
creator: Claire Rousselot
description: A sunburnt white-floral bouquet. Tuberose and gardenia turned slightly overripe in summer heat.

name: Bruyère Noire
description: Highland moor reduced to a single smoky accord. Heather, peat smoke, and damp leather.

name: Petit Matin d'Hiver
creator: Aurélie Hainaut
description: A cold-weather cologne: mandarin and mint against a pale woody drydown. Brisk without being sharp.

name: Cavalier Sec
creator: Edmund Halse
description: Dry hay and immortelle, the stable after the horses have gone in. Earthy and warmly bitter.

name: Coquelicot 33
description: A poppy-field powderiness from the interwar years. Almond and heliotrope dusted over iris.

name: Quinine Tonic
description: A gin-and-tonic cologne played straight: bitter citrus, juniper, and a dry vetiver finish.

name: Mémoire Basse
creator: Jeanne Castel
description: A greener-than-green chypre: narcissus and galbanum over mossy civet. Very much a prewar construction.

name: Fève Tardive
creator: Mathilde Quérac
description: A late-harvest tonka draped in coffee and bitter cocoa. A quiet, adult gourmand.

name: Verger 83
description: A cheerful orchard floral from the early eighties. Crisp green apple and pear over neroli.

name: Sphagnum
creator: Ivo Kortelainen
description: A boreal bog in a bottle: peat moss and fir balsam, with a papery birch note on top.

name: Marée Descendante
creator: Nour el Ghazal
description: The tide line at low water. Salted seaweed, weathered driftwood, a trace of ambergris.

name: Clair-Obscur
description: Powdery mimosa against a velveted suede. Deliberately understated.

name: Aqua Ferruginosa
creator: Lia Borromeo
description: A rusty mineral aquatic — the idea of an old spa fountain, iron-rich and faintly green.

name: Ordre du Midi
creator: Mikhail Varenne
description: A formal midcentury fougère, strict as a uniform. Lavender and sage locked into mossy leather.

name: Frangipanier de Fin d'Année
creator: Rosalinda Obregón
description: A tropical white floral rounded with fresh coconut water and milky sandalwood. Warm without being loud.

name: Monsoon Courtyard
description: Petrichor drifting through a jasmine courtyard. Spiced cardamom and smoky oud in the deep back.

name: Petite Ombre Verte
description: A small, shaded green: fig leaf and cypress resin, a bitter mastic undercurrent.

name: Bougie 22
creator: Theodor Vrabec
description: A recently extinguished beeswax candle. Smoky, honeyed, and unmistakably indoor.

name: Cactus de Serre
description: A greenhouse succulent at mid-morning. Spiky, slightly sweet, with a soft ambrette finish.

name: Chèvrefeuille Tardif
creator: Claire Rousselot
description: Honeysuckle and linden in late summer, drying into hay and a little benzoin warmth.

name: Orchard Keeper
description: Autumn orchard work. Bruised quince and walnut leaf over a mossy tobacco base.

name: Encens de Glacier
creator: Theodor Vrabec
description: A chilled, almost mentholated frankincense over pale cedar. An imagined high-altitude chapel.

name: Papyrus & Palme
creator: Rosalinda Obregón
description: A dry, green woody with a clean papyrus backbone. Bitter orange keeps it from getting too sober.

name: Sel d'Argent
description: A silvered, saline iris. Aldehydes give it an almost metallic top, with a driftwood tail.

name: Veille de Bal
creator: Claire Rousselot
description: A powdered, corseted rose-violet from the dawn of the Fifties. Formal and floor-length.

name: Cumin & Carbone
description: A hot-skinned leather with cumin and pepper up front. Divisive by design.

name: Passiflore Bleue
description: A tart passionfruit floral with a narrow green edge. Osmanthus keeps it from reading like a juice box.

name: Fumée d'Orge
creator: Mathilde Quérac
description: A smoky, malted gourmand. Imagine a distillery barrel room, in perfume form.

name: Fougère du Capitaine
creator: Edmund Halse
description: A strict old fougère in the barbershop line. Lavender over coumarin and moss. Nothing wasted.

name: Amande Givrée
description: Frosted bitter almond laid over heliotrope and iris. A frothy, almost marzipan-like gourmand.

name: Suède Fauve
creator: Aurélie Hainaut
description: A tawny suede warmed by saffron and dried apricot. Mid-eighties Parisian polish.

name: Gélée de Menthe
description: A chilled mint jelly of a perfume. Cold and clean, not toothpaste, not cocktail.

name: Vesper 1930
creator: Jeanne Castel
description: The archival Vésper composition. A classical floral chypre, preserved more-or-less as written.

name: Brique Chaude
description: Sun-heated brick, powdery and reddish. Incense and saffron carry it without sweetening it.

name: Verre Fumé
creator: Mikhail Varenne
description: Smoked glass tumblers in a closed library. Tea, tobacco and a little amber warmth.

name: Ciboulette
creator: Ivo Kortelainen
description: A vegetal oddity: chive and bell pepper over cool vetiver. A kitchen-garden curiosity more than a bouquet.

name: Nuit de Tanger
description: A spiced oriental: orange blossom over cinnamon tobacco and a dusky oud. Unapologetically heavy.

name: Pensée Sauvage
description: A fragile wartime floral built on violet and wild pansy. An honest, modest little composition.

name: Éclair de Pomme
description: A playful apple pastry gourmand from the mid-nineties. Sweet, but not quite a dessert.

name: Hinoki 02h
creator: Nour el Ghazal
description: A pale, nocturnal hinoki — bathhouse quiet. A thread of green tea and white pepper keeps it alert.

name: Cigale d'Août
creator: Lia Borromeo
description: A dry Mediterranean scrubland at high summer. Immortelle, cistus, and the rasp of cicadas implied.

name: Marché aux Fleurs
description: A bright flower-market muguet over a freshly watered green base. Cheerful without being trivial.

name: Ardoise Mouillée
description: Rain on roofing slate. Iris root and vetiver pull it toward the mineral end of the spectrum.

name: Chypre de Narbonne
description: A southern chypre, sun-roughened rather than polished. Clearly of its era, unmistakably of its place.

name: Boulot d'Hiver
creator: Edmund Halse
description: Birch bark over pine tar: a wintry, resinous woody with a little bonfire haze.

name: Minuit Morganatique
creator: Aurélie Hainaut
description: A private, secretive floral-oriental. Dark tuberose and black iris, turned to oud in the drydown.

name: Pluie sur Figuier
creator: Rosalinda Obregón
description: Summer rain hitting a fig tree. Milky fig and shredded leaf over damp earth.

name: Camphre No. 9
creator: Theodor Vrabec
description: A medicinal camphor-myrrh — closer to an apothecary drawer than a perfume counter.

name: Verveine Dimanche
description: A lemon-verbena cologne for Sunday mornings. Sharp, quiet, and gone in an hour.

name: Crinoline
creator: Claire Rousselot
description: A heavy, dressed-up rose-carnation in the old style. Ambergris and civet keep it from fading too soon.

name: Citron Brûlé
creator: Mathilde Quérac
description: A burnt-sugar lemon tart. Sharp peel, browned meringue, a warm tonka drydown.

name: Forge Froide
description: A cold forge at the end of the day. Iron filings, a leather apron, and the ghost of coal smoke.

name: Géranium Rose
description: A minty rose geranium married to a traditional rose-patchouli accord. Classical and a little brusque.

name: Enfance en Bois
creator: Ivo Kortelainen
description: Pencil shavings and clean cedar. A dry, schoolroom woody with a thin iris thread.

name: Marzipan Ancien
description: An almond-rose gourmand from just after the war. Candied, nostalgic, a little dusty.

name: Dérive Polaire
creator: Theodor Vrabec
description: A stark modern composition: cold ambroxan and iris over a blued cedar. The synthetic end of the spectrum.
